title: Symphyobasis macroplectra
taxonomy: Symphyobasis macroplectra is classified as a species of fungus in the family Symphyoblastaceae. This fungus is part of the larger group of organisms known as Ascomycota. The classification of Symphyobasis macroplectra is further divided into the genus Symphyobasis and the species macroplectra. The family Symphyoblastaceae is a small group of fungi that are closely related to the family Pyronemataceae. The classification of this fungus is based on its genetic and morphological characteristics.
